text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the start of summer camp, where racers
train to improve their skills. As for Eishin Flash...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Would you like to begin our training session?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I wish to begin our session thirty minutes
from now, so I changed in advance.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, there's a beach house over there! Let's go
have a look! ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on. Did you come here to play or to
train? Then again... I think I'll come along! ♪
choice_data_list: Do you want to relax a bit too?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I was able to procure sufficient rest on the bus.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention, the Japan Cup will be filled with
senior year racers.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This will be an opportunity to face formidable
competition I wouldn't normally be able to at this
time of year...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I must push myself to polish up my form
beyond perfection.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: It's almost time to go. Let summer camp begin.
